# v1.1.1 — Refresh analysis notebook outputs

Patch over v1.1.0: `analysis/explore.ipynb` was tagged with stale cell outputs.
This release re-runs the notebook so rendered charts and tables match the
published results.

No code, eval, or configuration changes. See the
[v1.1.0 release notes](v1.1.0.md) for the full scope of the documentation
overhaul.
